"C:\Program Files\JetBrains\CLion 2020.3.1\bin\cmake\win\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\61A___Ultra_Fast_Mathematician.dir/objects.a
C:\MinGW\bin\ar.exe cr CMakeFiles\61A___Ultra_Fast_Mathematician.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\61A___Ultra_Fast_Mathematician.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\MinGW\bin\g++.exe -g   -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\61A___Ultra_Fast_Mathematician.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive  -o 61A___Ultra_Fast_Mathematician.exe -Wl,--out-implib,lib61A___Ultra_Fast_Mathematician.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\61A___Ultra_Fast_Mathematician.dir\linklibs.rsp
